name: OathbreakerAttestation
description: Attests the outcome of an oath in the Oathbreaker game. An oath is a declared commitment between two agents before a round. Outcome: kept or broken.

fields.name: attester
fields.description: Agent issuing the attestation (counterparty or platform)

fields.name: subject
fields.description: Agent whose oath is being attested

fields.name: stakes
fields.description: Token amount staked on the oath (wei)

asymmetry.description: Broken oaths carry 1.5× the magnitude of equivalent kept oaths. Reputation recovery requires 3 subsequent OathKept attestations to offset one OathBroken.

stakesScaling.description: Higher-stakes oaths carry more weight. Uncapped but log-compressed.

notes: The foundational game of the season. Season 1 Game 1. OathBroken attestations persist with minimal decay — betrayal is remembered.
